title: Escape From Tarkraft Mod
description: Modern weapons. Tactical gear. A high-stakes multiplayer extraction shooter inside Minecraft.
body:
# **Escape From Tarkraft**

![Tarkraft Hero](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1560/978/tarkraft-board-png.png)

_A realistic multiplayer extraction shooter experience._

***

## 🔥 **Features**
**Multiplayer** – Fully networked (US host _for now_). ![Back Mall](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1560/993/multiplayer-experience-png.png)
    
**Huge Maps** – Interchange features massive outdoor areas as well as extensive loot inside the mall. ![Interchange](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1426/922/outdoor-mall-png.png)
    
**Quests & Tasks** – Progression that keeps you grinding.
    
**Custom Items & Mechanics** – Unique systems never before seen in Minecraft.
    

![Healing UI](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1426/912/medstation-png.png)

**Ballistic Realism** –  
 *   Armor penetration by bullet type
 *   Colored smokes
 *   Persisting bullet entities

![Hideout](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1426/920/hideout2-png.png)

**Armor Plates** – Modular protection mechanics.

**Backpacks** – Bring more loot to the battlefield.

**Dynamic Maps** – Shatter glass with gunfire.

**Tactical AI** –
 *   Long- and close-range tactics
 *   Melee-rushing bosses
 *   ⚠️ Beware the **Factory Boss**…

***
## 🚧 **In Development** 🚧
***

## 🌐 **Community & Support**

*   💬 Join the [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/7KVa7nMUbP)
*   💎 Support us at [**CraftingStore**](https://escapefromtarkraft.craftingstore.net/)  
*   Cosmetic hideout [**Upgrades**](https://escapefromtarkraft.craftingstore.net/)  

***

## 🛠️ **About This Helper Mod**

This **client-side mod** is required for ShiftingKill’s **Escape From Tarkraft server**.

It adds:

*   Modular **gun part rendering**
*   **Dynamic lighting & fog effects**
*   **Keybinds & QoL features**
*   Much more…

***

## 🎨 Assets & Attribution

Some gun models in Escape From Tarkraft are provided by the **[maxstuff pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/maxstuff)** by Max (maxinablender).  
All assets are used **with permission** under the **CC 4.0** license.  
_Not all models from the pack are included; only selected assets are used in this mod. Future updates may include more attachments as I can add them. You may not use any of the models from this pack unless permitted by the original model makers._

***

**Escape From Tarkraft isn’t just a mod – it’s a persistent service and whole new way to play Minecraft.**
